title: bigelowia glauca
intro: Bigelowia glauca, also known as Bigelow's yarrow or Bigelow's ragwort, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The plant is rich in flavonoids, sesquiterpene lactones, and other bioactive compounds, which contribute to its health benefits, such as anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Bigelowia glauca can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a valuable resource for natural medicine and wellness.
